_meta.description: Reset password for a single Okta user. Navigates to the user's profile page, opens More Actions dropdown, clicks Reset Password, and confirms.

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

userId.description: Okta user ID (format: 00u{alphanumeric}698). Get from list-users perceive mainActions.

anomalies: Reset Password action is in the 'More Actions' dropdown on user profile page
For STAGED users, action is 'Set Password & Activate' instead of 'Reset Password'
After clicking Reset Password, a confirmation dialog appears with option to send password reset email
No explicit confirmation button required — Okta may auto-reset or show email confirmation

verificationStrategy.pre: User profile page loaded, More Actions dropdown visible
verificationStrategy.post: Success message shown OR user status remains unchanged but password reset email sent
verificationStrategy.primaryVerification: notification contains 'password reset' OR 'email sent' OR user profile still accessible

more-actions-dropdown.description: More Actions dropdown on user profile page
more-actions-dropdown.resolveHint: Click 'More Actions' button on user profile page header

reset-password-action.description: Reset Password action in More Actions dropdown
reset-password-action.resolveHint: After opening More Actions, look for 'Reset Password' text

chain.note: HOME START — navigate to users list as entry point
Wait for home page to render
Verify we are on the users list (home state)
Navigate to target user's profile page
Wait for user profile page to fully render
Perceive user profile page. Confirm we see user header with name and email. Look for 'More Actions' button.
Click More Actions dropdown to reveal lifecycle actions (Reset Password, Deactivate, Suspend, etc.)
Wait for dropdown menu to appear
Perceive More Actions dropdown. Should show: Reset Password (or 'Set Password & Activate' if STAGED), Reset Authenticators, Suspend, Deactivate.
Click 'Reset Password' action. Fallback: 'Set Password & Activate' if user is STAGED.
Wait for reset password confirmation or modal to appear
Perceive the confirmation state. May show a modal asking to confirm email, or may immediately process. Look for success message.
If confirmation modal appeared, click OK to confirm password reset. Fallback buttons: 'Confirm', 'Reset', 'Send Email'.
Wait for password reset to complete
Verify password reset was initiated. Should see success message or notification. User status may show 'Password reset' or similar.
HOME END — navigate back to users list to complete the bookend
Wait for home page to load
Verify we are back at the users list (home state)
